title: S + see/hear/watch + O + V-ing/V原形（感官動詞）

formulas.zh: 感官動詞後接受詞和動詞原形，表示目睹或感知整個完整動作
感官動詞後接受詞和現在分詞，表示動作正在進行中

formulas.formula: O + be + seen/heard/watched/felt/noticed + to V (被動式)
formulas.zh: 被動語態時，原形動詞改為to V

explanation: 感官動詞（see、hear、watch、feel、notice）後接受詞時，可搭配動詞原形或現在分詞。使用原形表示看到或聽到整個完整的動作過程；使用現在分詞表示動作正在進行中。被動語態時，原形動詞需改為to V形式。注意：感官動詞本身不使用進行式；hear與listen的區別在於前者強調客觀感知結果。

examples.eng: I saw the accident happen right in front of the school.
examples.chi: 我看到那場車禍就在學校門口發生。

examples.eng: She heard someone crying outside her bedroom last night.
examples.chi: 她昨晚聽到有人在她臥室外哭泣。

examples.eng: The teacher noticed the students cheating during the exam.
examples.chi: 老師注意到學生在考試中作弊。

examples.eng: A strange light was seen disappearing into the sky by many witnesses.
examples.chi: 許多目擊者看到一道奇異的光消失在天空中。

extension.tip: 判斷使用原形或現在分詞的關鍵：看到整個動作從開始到結束用原形（He saw the bird fly away）；看到動作正進行時用現在分詞（He saw the bird flying）。被動式時原形變to V（The bird was seen to fly away）。

examples.test: I saw him leave the classroom. vs. I saw him leaving the classroom.
examples.result: → 前者表示看到他離開全過程；後者表示看到他離開的過程中（可能還未完全離開）

examples.test: She was heard to sing beautifully.
examples.result: → 被動式需用to V，不能寫was heard singing（該句為被動式不同結構）

examples.test: I'm hearing music vs. I hear music.
examples.result: → 感官動詞hear不用進行式，聽覺的狀態用簡單式表達

extension.note: 原形表終始，分詞表進行；被動改to V，感官動詞勿進行。

parts: into the water and disappear quickly.
exercises.sentence: I watched the young girl jump into the water and disappear quickly.
exercises.translation: 我看著那個小女孩跳入水中並快速消失。

exercises.sentence: Did you hear someone knocking at the door last night?
exercises.translation: 你昨晚聽到有人敲門嗎？

parts: by dozens of people who rushed to help.
exercises.sentence: The accident was seen to happen by dozens of people who rushed to help.
exercises.translation: 那場事故被許多趕來幫忙的人看到發生。

parts: her with suspicion, so she felt uncomfortable.
exercises.sentence: She noticed the stranger watching her with suspicion, so she felt uncomfortable.
exercises.translation: 她注意到那個陌生人懷疑地注視著她，所以她感到不舒服。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的感官動詞搭配形式
mc_exercises.question_eng: I saw the children _______ in the playground yesterday afternoon.
mc_exercises.explanation: 句子描述看到孩子們「正在玩耍」的動作過程，應用現在分詞 playing 表示動作進行中。A 項原形表示完整動作但此句強調進行狀態；C 項 to play 為不定詞，感官動詞不搭配；D 項過去式語法錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷感官動詞後接原形或現在分詞的差異
mc_exercises.question_eng: She heard the door _______ and immediately turned around.
mc_exercises.explanation: 「聽到門打開」表示完整的動作事件，應用動詞原形 open。現在分詞 opening 表示動作進行但此句著重整個打開事件；B 項不定詞語法錯誤；D 項過去式不符感官動詞用法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 感官動詞被動語態的正確形式
mc_exercises.question_eng: The strange noise was heard _______ from the attic by all the residents in the building.
mc_exercises.explanation: 感官動詞被動語態中，原形動詞需改為 to V 形式，故「被聽到發出聲音」應用 to come。A 項現在分詞在被動語態不適用；C 項原形在被動語態需改為不定詞；D 項形式冗餘。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複雜語境中感官動詞與動詞形式的正確搭配
mc_exercises.question_eng: The witnesses reported that they watched the suspect _______ the store and _______ away in a black car after the robbery.
mc_exercises.explanation: 連貫的完整動作「看到嫌犯離開店舖並開車逃離」應用原形 leave 和 drive，表示目睹整個事件過程。A、C、D 項混用現在分詞和原形，但此句強調完整事件序列，應全用原形保持平行結構且強調事實性。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我看到一隻貓在花園裡跑來跑去。
translation_exercises.answer: I saw a cat running around in the garden.
key_points: running around（現在分詞表示動作正在進行）
hints: 提示1：使用『see + O + V-ing』結構，因為貓的跑動是正在進行的動作
提示2：不可寫成『saw a cat run』，因為題意強調『跑來跑去』的動作過程，需用現在分詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 老師注意到學生們在教室裡交談時沒有認真聽課。
translation_exercises.answer: The teacher noticed students talking to each other instead of listening carefully to the lesson in the classroom.
key_points: talking to each other（現在分詞表示同時進行的動作）
hints: 提示1：『notice + O + V-ing』用來描述老師觀察到學生們『正在交談』的情況
提示2：注意『instead of listening』也要用V-ing形式保持平行結構，而非instead of to listen

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我聽到隔壁房間傳來的音樂聲，所以我知道我的朋友在那裡。
translation_exercises.answer: I heard music coming from the next room, so I knew my friend was there. / I heard music come from the next room, so I knew my friend was there.
key_points: hear + O + V-ing / hear + O + V原形
hear強調客觀感知結果（區別於listen主動傾聽）
hints: 提示1：『hear + O + V-ing』（music coming）強調聲音正在傳出；『hear + O + V原形』（music come）強調聲音傳出的完整過程，兩者皆可接受
提示2：不可用『listen to music』代替『hear music』，因為題意是客觀聽到而非主動傾聽；V-ing或V原形都表達得出題意

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 演唱會上，我們看著表演者在舞台上跳舞，他的精彩表現令全場觀眾感動。被動語態：表演者的精彩跳舞表演被全場觀眾看著進行。
translation_exercises.answer: At the concert, we watched the performer dancing on the stage, and his wonderful performance moved the entire audience. / The performer was seen to dance wonderfully on the stage by the entire audience at the concert.
key_points: be seen to V（被動式，原形改為to V）
動詞V-ing vs to V的轉換規則
hints: 提示1：主動語態『watch + O + V-ing』強調持續觀看表演者『正在跳舞』的過程；被動語態需改為『be seen to dance』，注意V-ing改為to V形式
提示2：被動式常見錯誤是寫成『be seen dancing』，但感官動詞的被動式必須使用『to + V原形』而非V-ing形式
